mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales signals near-term household demand strength and upward earnings revisions for consumer-linked sectors, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value 507533 as of one month before 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS growth is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in less than 50% of walk-forward observations or if its rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above its prior 24-month high, the marginal discount rate applied to equity cash flows rises and liquidity conditions tighten, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS crosses above its trailing 24-month high
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value 1.91 as of one month before 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations have average 60-day S&P 500 returns greater than the unconditional average by more than 25 bps or if downside hit rate is below 55%.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating CPI combined with a rising federal funds rate signals policy tightening in response to inflation, which compresses equity valuation multiples and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized growth crosses above 2.5% while FEDFUNDS rises over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value 251.286 and FEDFUNDS 1.91 before 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint trigger is followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if the interaction term has nonnegative estimated return impact in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate below 4% combined with slowing payroll growth marks late-cycle labor tightness and fading job momentum, reducing expected profit growth and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE crosses below 4.0 while PAYEMS 3-month average growth falls below its prior 6-month average
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 3.9 and PAYEMS 149128 before 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered periods have a positive mean 60-day S&P 500 return and the downside hit rate is below 55% in walk-forward evaluation.

mechanism_narrative: A rising industrial production trend signals improving real output and operating leverage for cyclical firms, causing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as growth-sensitive equities reprice.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value 107.9989 as of one month before 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month INDPRO momentum has a 5-day forward S&P 500 mean return below zero or if the rolling 2-year sign hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: A downward crossing in housing starts below a key activity threshold signals weakening interest-sensitive demand and future construction drag, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses below 1200 after being above 1200 within the prior 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value 1173 as of two months before 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST downward-threshold triggers are followed by positive 60-day S&P 500 returns in more than 55% of cases or if average triggered return is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in the unemployment rate signals a transition from expansion to labor-market deterioration, reducing earnings expectations and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value 3.9 as of one month before 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if triggered observations produce nonnegative average 20-day S&P 500 returns or if downside hit rate is below 55% in out-of-sample walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Decelerating CPI while the federal funds rate remains below 2% signals inflation relief without highly restrictive policy, lowering discount-rate pressure and producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth crosses below its 12-month growth rate while FEDFUNDS is below 2.0
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value 251.286 and FEDFUNDS 1.91 before 2018-08-15
failure_condition: Reject if the joint disinflation-and-low-rate trigger has average 5-day S&P 500 returns below zero or if its walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 for two consecutive years.
